sync.detail: No Robinhood MCP session is authenticated in this build; use proposal mode until broker account data is explicitly synced.

capital_radar.detail: Tickets are generated from live Capital Radar macro, holding zone, action permission, and exposure outputs.
capital_radar.macro_permission: Hold core; selective adds allowed only at ruled zones.
capital_radar.risk_rule: Break below 200D 6,882 with VIX expansion shifts posture defensive.

policy.execution_policy: No order placement without an exact trade ticket approved by Jun. The bridge may read broker data after connection, but Capital Radar remains the decision system.
forbidden: orders during FOMC/CPI/earnings without special gate

readiness.summary: 0 proposal-ready ticket(s), 9 blocked ticket(s). Broker sync is not connected, so execution remains disabled.

gates.label: Capital Radar live state
gates.detail: Macro, holdings, zones, and exposure artifacts are present.

gates.label: Robinhood MCP sync
gates.detail: Connect and authenticate the Agentic account before account-level reconciliation.

gates.label: Human approval
gates.detail: Every order needs exact approval from Jun before placement.

gates.label: Post-trade journal
gates.detail: Approved, rejected, and filled tickets must be logged with source snapshot.

hard_rules.label: No autonomous orders
hard_rules.detail: The system can propose tickets, not trade freely.

hard_rules.label: No options by default
hard_rules.detail: Options require a separate explicit approval policy.

hard_rules.label: No market orders by default
hard_rules.detail: Limit order ticket must specify ticker, side, price, size, expiry, and invalidation.

hard_rules.label: No margin
hard_rules.detail: Agentic account should only use prefunded cash budget.

hard_rules.label: Macro/event gate
hard_rules.detail: FOMC, CPI, earnings, and large gap moves require a separate confirmation check.

tickets.recommendation: Generate loss-control ticket; minimize damage with human approval.
tickets.next_step: Wait for broker sync, macro permission, and exact approval gate.
